---
name: New Minimal Package Request
about: Request a new package be added to Minimal
title: "[PkgReq] <package name>"
labels: pkgreq, triage
type: Task

---

Thanks for suggesting a new package! If you'd rather send the package yourself as a pull request, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) — we welcome PRs for new packages.

**Package name**
<!-- The name you'd expect to type after `min add`. e.g. `ripgrep`, `python`, `jq` -->

**Upstream project URL**
<!-- Homepage or canonical source repo. Please verify it's the current canonical location (renames/transfers happen). -->

**What does this package provide?**
<!-- One or two sentences on what it is and what it's useful for. -->

**Why would you like to see it in Minimal?**
<!-- Optional: your use case helps us prioritize. -->

**Anything else?**
<!-- Optional: known build quirks, required system dependencies, alternative upstream forks, etc. -->
